sglang.title: [pd-router] add retry and circuit breakfor for pd router
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR adds circuit breaker and retry support to the PD (Prefill-Decode) router, bringing it to feature parity with the regular router. The implementation includes a critical update for bootstrap injection to ensure correct prefill-decode coordination during retries.
Motivation
The PD route

sglang.title: Support radix cache for Lora feature
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Close #2880

Modifications
To support radix cache for Lora, this PR does the following modifications:

Add a new LoRARadixCache as a special version of RadixCache.  They are mostly the same, except that the node in LoRARadixCache uses hash(lora_id + str(token_ids[0]) as its key for prefix

This PR fixes an assertion error that occurs when chunked_prefill_size is set to -1 (disabled state).

AssertionError: chunked_prefill_size

sglang.title: (gpt-oss, oai, chat): Remove Harmony Integration and Implement Native GPT-OSS Tool Call Support
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Why remove Harmony
Harmony integration was removed due to two critical limitations:

Missing output token ID support: Harmony requires output token IDs for proper functioning, but we currently have a bug in tokenizer_manager that prevents accessing these token IDs
No tool call support for

sglang.title: [router] Add Rust Binary Entrypoint for SGLang Router
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
This PR adds a native Rust binary entrypoint for the SGLang router, allowing it to run directly without Python. The router can now be executed as ./sglang-router with full CLI with the Python launcher.
Motivation
Previously, the SGLang router required Python to launch, even though the core i

sglang.title: Fix mismatch between padded_scales shape and reshape dimensions in modelopt quantization
sglang.author: ovowei
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Modifications
In the current implementation, padded_scales is initialized with shape (B, M_padded, K_padded), but later reshaped to (B, M, K) or (M, K) depending on scale_ndim. This leads to a mismatch and potential runtime errors or incorrect memory alignment, especially during NVFP4 qu

Modifications


By default, we will choose dual_chunk_flash_attn when the model has dual_chun

sglang.bodyExcerpt:

Fix the extraction of commentary messages in gpt-oss with non-stream tool-call.
